summary: This is not a blog post but a brief administrative notice informing readers that Joel on Software has moved to a new server. Joel asks readers to update their bookmarks to the new URL. He notes the old URL will continue working but will eventually redirect.
key_points: Site migrated to new server at joelonsoftware.com
Old URLs will continue working temporarily before redirecting
money_quotes: The old URL will continue to work for a long, long time, but will eventually just redirect you.
key_insight: This is a minor administrative notice about a server migration, not a substantive blog post.
